Amazon No-Moving Products Report -- LEDSONE & DCVoltage (Production v002)

Generated: 2026-07-20T00:00:00 (production v002 -- fresh live extraction + hosted row-density fix) Latest complete data date: 2026-07-19
These stock figures are based on live data, not past records.
Selected period:
No rows match the current filters.
Calculation Formulas
Conversion Rate (%) = Units Ordered ÷ Sessions × 100
The percentage of visits that resulted in ordered units.
CTR (%) = PPC Clicks ÷ PPC Impressions × 100
The percentage of advertising impressions that resulted in clicks.
ACOS (%) = PPC Spend ÷ PPC Attributed Sales × 100
Advertising cost as a percentage of sales attributed to advertising.
Buy Box (%) = Weighted Buy Box total ÷ Buy Box weighting total
The weighted percentage of eligible customer visits where the product held the Buy Box.
Category Average Price = Average valid product price within the same marketplace and approved product group
A comparison price representing similar products in the selected marketplace.
Days Since Last Sale = Report end date − most recent sale date
The number of days since the product last recorded a sale.
